response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as 'Mizunyasu' from on-screen birthday branding and the song title as 'Step into Dreams'. 2. Performed a search for 'Step into Dreams Mizunyasu lyrics'. 3. The search returned a result for the song 'Step into the Dream' by 'miry', which matches the lyrics played. 4. Created a single scene for the entire video as the song plays continuously. 5. Formatted the full Japanese lyrics and English translation into the JSON schema.
response.global_summary: The video features a static anime-style image of a character with light blue hair accompanied by the song "Step into the Dream" performed by Mizunyasu. The music plays throughout the entirety of the 5-minute video.

scenes.description: The video is a static image of an anime character with the text 'Step into Dreams' in the background while the song 'Step into the Dream' plays.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Light rays breaking through the clouds
The wet station is wrapped in brilliance
A smiling face turning back on the platform of departure
Future prospects! You said so brightly
You waved a peace sign at me as I saw you off, step into the dream
I will do my best here too, promise
The feeling of having crossed fingers is sad
I followed your moving eyes with my gaze
What did you say? The train carried your voice away
For a moment, your shining cheek, step into the dream
For the two of us departing, in our faint love
Future prospects! I tell myself strongly in my heart
Not to lose to you taking your step
step into the dream step into the dream
License
step into the dream
miry
